take. And then when you find out how
long something takes, you then ask the
next question, which is, how can I make
this take less time? How can I automate
this thing? How can I automate portions
of this work? How can I How can I give
away chunks of this? How can I deem some

continuous cutting and pulling forward
of tasks is how you can move so much
